PRE-LAUNCH CHECKLIST
❏ Print 200 Copies of Contract/Waiver
-(or 130% of your desired number of sign ups).
❏ Print copies of Meal Plans
# of Desired Clients X
(“1.25 Plan” x .15/”1.75 Plan” x .30/”2.25 Plan” x .35/”2.75 Plan” x .15)
EX: 100 clients = 1.25 Plan= 15 copies/1.75 Plan=30 Copies/2.25 Plan=35
Copies/2.75 Plan=15 Copies
❏ Cell phone with local area code
❏ (9) clipboards
❏ (8) hooks mountable to gym wall (in line)
❏ Sales area set up in gym (table, table cloth, 6 foldable chairs)
❏ Staff Education:
-Watch Video Presentation with entire staff
-Watch Nutrition Orientation (1&2) with entire staff
-Watch Nutrition FAQ with entire staff
-Watch Accountability Presentation with entire staff
❏ Ability to Service the Desired amount of members, or increase session
amounts or times as is deemed satisfactory to provide sufficient room
for servicing prospective challenge clients.
We just need to make sure you are all squared away with session times & trainers
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
